name: Tofu Burgers
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce (vegetarian when I can find it)
1 tsp Marmite (I sometimes use a bit more but it is very salty)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the tofu into a large bowl and add the remaining ingredients.
2. Mix together until you achieve the desired consistency. You may need to mix by hand, pressing everything together firmly.
3. If the mixture seems too dry, add a bit more ketchup until it reaches an appropriate texture.
4. The burgers can be grilled on the barbecue, fried in a little margarine or oil, or grilled under the broiler.
5. Serve in a bun or with other vegetables.
